props.name: width
props.description: Width of the table. By default it will fit the enclosed content.

props.name: stickyheader
props.description: When true, the table header sticks to the top when scrolling.

props.name: striped
props.description: When true, alternates row background colors for improved readability.

props.name: variant
props.description: A relaxed variant of the table with more vertical padding for the cells.

props.name: sortMode
props.description: Sort mode: "single" allows one column, "multi" allows up to 2 columns.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

events.name: onSort
events.description: Called when sort state changes in single-sort mode. Receives { sortBy, sortDir }.

events.name: _sort
events.description: Dispatched when sort state changes in single-sort mode. Detail contains { sortBy, sortDir }.

events.name: onMultiSort
events.description: Called when sort state changes in multi-sort mode. Receives { sorts: GoabTableSortEntry[] }.

events.name: _multisort
events.description: Dispatched when sort state changes in multi-sort mode. Detail contains { sorts: GoabTableSortEntry[] }.
